title: VQC
description: Variational Quantum Classifier (VQC) using data re-uploading on the Iris dataset for 3-class classification via Pauli-Z expectation values.

params.help: Number of parameterized ansatz layers (4 qubits fixed for Iris 4-feature input).
params.name: layers
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 5，范围在1到10之间

params.name: epochs
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 20，范围在1到100之间

params.help: Positive Adam optimizer learning rate. Typical range: 0.01 to 0.2.
params.name: lr
params.info: 请输入正数学习率，典型范围0.01到0.2（如 0.05）

params.help: Number of samples per training mini-batch. Iris dataset has 120 training samples.
params.name: batch_size
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 16，范围在1到120之间
